title: Process Technician
description:
• Operate power plant systems in the control room and field, monitoring process parameters and maintaining stable, safe operations.

  • Perform start-up, shutdown, and changeover of plant equipment such as pumps, fans, compressors, boilers/HRSG, cooling water and auxiliary systems.

  • Conduct routine field rounds, record operating data, and report abnormal conditions.

  • Respond to alarms, trips, and plant upsets, carry out first-line troubleshooting, and escalate issues when required.

  • Carry out routine preventive maintenance tasks including inspections, lubrication, minor repairs, and condition monitoring.

  • Assist in corrective maintenance, equipment isolation, lock-out/tag-out, draining, venting, and reinstatement of plant systems.

  • Support fault diagnosis and basic failure analysis for rotating equipment, valves, piping, and process systems.

  • Raise and close work orders in the CMMS, including documentation of findings, actions taken, and spare parts used.

  • Comply with Singapore WSH regulations, site safety rules, and maintain good housekeeping standards.

  • Perform Permit-to-Work roles such as permit applicant, gas testing (where authorised), and isolation verification.

  • Carry out operational testing, basic instrument checks, sampling, and simple functional or calibration support as required.

  • Maintain accurate shift logs, operational records, and handover notes for continuity of operations.

  • Coordinate and supervise subcontractors during maintenance activities, shutdowns, and turnaround works.

  • Liaise with client representatives for work planning, access, permits, and restoration of equipment.

  • Participate in shift handovers, incident reporting, and follow-up corrective actions.

  • Support continuous improvement activities related to plant reliability, efficiency, and operational performance.

postedCompany.description: Marlin Plant Engineering Pte Ltd, established in 2020 in Singapore, swiftly established a strong presence in the process sector. In just three years, we’ve built a reputation for delivering outstanding engineering services. Our portfolio boasts partnerships with leading names like Senoko Energy Pte Ltd, Tuas Power Generation, City Energy Pte Ltd (as a Trustee of City Energy Trust) etc. We’re not just contractors; we’re an integral part of our clients’ operations, especially noted for our work in mechanical, electrical, civil and air-conditioning systems in the manufacturing of petroleum, petrochemical, pharmaceutical and power plants. Holding three significant contracts with a minimum validity of one year, we ensure optimal performance and reliability in every project we undertake.
postedCompany.name: MARLIN PLANT ENGINEERING PTE. LTD.
